features: GREAT PROTECTION: Give your smile a boost by brushing with our Colgate Maximum Cavity Protection Toothpaste
CALCIUM BOOST: Our cavity toothpaste with calcium boost is designed to strengthen enamel and protect against cavities forming
FIGHTS CAVITIES: Our caries toothpaste contains fluoride, which is clinically proven to fight cavities on the surfaces of your teeth as well as on exposed roots
STRENGTHENS AND REPAIRS: The calcium-enriched fluoride formula in our cavity protection toothpaste helps to strengthen your teeth and repair weak spots before cavities start
DUAL ANTICAVITY SYSTEM: Our cavity protection toothpaste has a dual anticavity system with fluoride
GREAT REGULAR FLAVOUR: With a great mint regular flavour, our fluoride toothpaste freshens your breath
description: Product Description Give your smile a boost by brushing with our Colgate Maximum Cavity Protection Toothpaste. Our cavity toothpaste with calcium boost is designed to strengthen enamel and protect against cavities forming. That’s something to smile about! Our cavity protection toothpaste contains fluoride, which is clinically proven to fight cavities on the surfaces of your teeth as well as on exposed roots. The calcium-enriched fluoride formula helps to strengthen your teeth and repair weak spots before cavities start, giving your smile great care! What’s more, the fluoride toothpaste for cavity prevention has a dual anticavity system with fluoride and a great mint regular flavour that also freshens your breath. It also comes in a recyclable tube. Give your smile the protection it deserves to help keep it in great shape! Ingredients INGREDIENTS: Dicalcium Phosphate Dihydrate, Aqua, Glycerin, Arginine, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Monofluorophosphate, Hydrated Silica, Aroma, Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate, Phosphoric Acid, Sodium Saccharin, Sucralose, Limonene. Contains: Sodium Monofluorophosphate Total Fluoride content: 1450 ppm Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to a toothbrush and brush all tooth surfaces for two minutes. Safety Warning If more than used for brushing is accidentally swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away. Keep out of reach of children under 6 years of age. Manufacturer Contact Information Colgate-Palmolive, Guildford, GU2 8JZ.Colgate-Palmolive, Guildford, GU2 8JZ. See more
